infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Steer Me uses your camera to capture a photo of your Global Handicap card, a profile photo, or a producer verification document, only when you choose to take a photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Steer Me uses your photo library so you can select a photo of your Global Handicap card, a profile photo, or a producer verification document, only when you choose to pick one.

plugins.photosPermission: Steer Me uses your photo library so you can select a photo of your Global Handicap card, a profile photo, or a producer verification document, only when you choose to pick one.
plugins.cameraPermission: Steer Me uses your camera to capture a photo of your Global Handicap card, a profile photo, or a producer verification document, only when you choose to take a photo.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Steer Me uses your current location, only when you turn this on in Browse, to show eligible partners near where you actually are while traveling.
